zh.title: 阿兹特克第五太阳预言 - 五个太阳纪的创世神话与末日预言 | Aztec Fifth Sun Prophecy
zh.description: 阿兹特克文明五个太阳纪（Cinco Soles）创世神话完整收录：四个已毁灭的世界与我们所在的第五太阳纪。源自《太阳传说》《奇马尔波波卡抄本》及太阳石刻。含14条核心预言与历史验证。
zh.keywords: 阿兹特克预言,第五太阳,五个太阳纪,Nahui Ollin,太阳石,阿兹特克神话,玛雅预言,中美洲文明,羽蛇神,特斯卡特利波卡
zh.siteName: 阿兹特克第五太阳预言
zh.ogTitle: 阿兹特克第五太阳预言 | Aztec Fifth Sun Prophecy
zh.ogDescription: 阿兹特克文明五个太阳纪创世神话完整收录与验证。四个已毁灭的世界，以及我们所在的第五太阳纪——注定在地震中终结。
zh.twitterDescription: 阿兹特克五个太阳纪创世神话：四个已毁灭的世界与第五太阳纪末日预言。源自太阳石刻与奇马尔波波卡抄本。

en.title: Aztec Fifth Sun Prophecy - Five Suns Creation Myth & End Times | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: Complete archive of the Aztec Five Suns (Cinco Soles) creation myth: four destroyed worlds and the Fifth Sun (Nahui Ollin) we inhabit, destined to end in earthquakes. Sourced from the Legend of the Suns, Codex Chimalpopoca, and the Aztec Sun Stone.
en.keywords: Aztec prophecy,Fifth Sun,Five Suns,Nahui Ollin,Sun Stone,Aztec mythology,Quetzalcoatl,Tezcatlipoca,Mesoamerican civilization,Aztec calendar
en.ogTitle: Aztec Fifth Sun Prophecy - The Five Suns Creation Myth
en.ogDescription: Complete archive of the Aztec Five Suns creation myth with historical verification. Four destroyed worlds and the Fifth Sun destined to end in earthquakes.
en.twitterDescription: Aztec Five Suns creation myth: four destroyed worlds and the Fifth Sun prophecy. Sourced from the Sun Stone and Codex Chimalpopoca.
